extortion.description: George Haney & Son Inc is a family-owned HVAC contractor based in Pasadena, CA, providing services to the San Fernando and San Gabriel Valleys. With a strong reputation since 1927, they specialize in the installation, maintenance, and repair of various HVAC systems, including central AC, heating, and mini-split systems. As a Carrier Factory Authorized Dealer, they cater to both residential and commercial clients, offering customized solutions with a focus on energy efficiency. Their experienced technicians are available for emergency services and emphasize outstanding customer service and value.
